resources.string:
1. Initiating the Deletion Process:" Users can request the deletion of their accounts through our dedicated account settings page.
"2. Permanent Deletion:" If users choose to proceed with the account deletion, their accounts will be permanently deleted from our system. All personal information, account data, and associated records will be irreversibly removed.
"3. Comprehensive Removal:" The account deletion process is designed to be thorough. All clinics, package purchases, and associated data will be wiped clean from our servers.
"4. Data Privacy Assurance:" We prioritize the privacy and security of our users. Rest assured, once the account deletion is complete, your information will not be retained or accessible.
"5. Customer Support:" Our customer support team is available to assist users throughout the process, addressing any concerns and providing guidance on alternatives.
"6. Feedback and Improvement:" We value user feedback. If you have suggestions for improving our account deletion process or any other aspect of our service, please let us know."
Please agree to the Clinicia Terms of Service.
Sorry.! Network unavailable, please check your internet connection and try again

"Your all clinics and package purchases will be deleted.
Are you sure you want to delete your account?"
Are you sure you want to delete?
Cannot modify visit. Bill has been generated for it.
Allow Other Users to modify Treatment/Medicine Rates
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Please contact Clinicia Care at Ph no. 8097 700 800 to add more department.
Data will be sent to registered Email ID.
Do you want to save changes?
Do you want to collect membership fees?
Please enable call permission from settings
Please enter email or mobile no.
Password and Confirm password not match
From GCM: server deleted %1$d pending messages!

string.name: important_here
string.u: You can read the complete guidelines here

resources.string: Include clinic name in SMS to patient
Include doctor name in all printouts
Include doctor name in SMS to patient
Include patient name in SMS to visiting doctor
Include visiting doctor name if selected in SMS to patient

"Clinicia requires permission to access Phone’s Call log & Phone state for showing the details of the Patient whenever Patient calls the Doctors from their registered Mobile no.
Clinicia will show Patient Name, Outstanding Amount & Last Visit Date for incoming calls from Patients."

u.b: How I get Instamojo account details?

resources.string: Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Allow Other Users to modify Approved Visits
Are you want to exit without saving image ?

Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Oops, You don’t have any coupons yet!
Oops, You don’t have any friends yet!
No. of Days for Invoice Due:
No treatment found in this clinic.
Allow Other Users to record Past Dated Entries

Patients can search your profile in your area. They can see your profile details, clinic address and information about your clinic. They can also see phone number of your clinic. Your personal contact details are NOT listed.
"Contacts permissions are needed for providing email completions."
Please send your inputs, feedback, queries here.
Prefered image size: 1 inch x 2 inch
Prompt for remarks during bill generation
Click here to initiate the account opening.
"If you enjoy using this app, would you mind taking a moment to rate it? It won't take more than a minute. Thank you for your support!"

From Demo Server: successfully added device!

From Demo Server: successfully removed device!
Show consent dialog after patient added
SMS Campaign is disabled for trial user
%s Account link is not available, Update the Link from Settings > Account Preference
To reactivate your subscription, select your subscription period
To change your subscription, select your new subscription period
Both input and output Uri must be specified
Therefore, override color resource (ucrop_color_toolbar_widget) in your app to make it work on pre-L devices
T- Treatment, O - Observation / Notes, D - Diagnosis, C - Complaint, I - Investigation
Your profile is listed in www.clinicia.com
